summary: PowerShell scripts follow language best practices (StrictMode, error handling, type coercion, parameter validation). However, workflow violates core GitHub Actions requirement: task mandates test harness running actionlint + `act push` for fixture-driven testing with output captured to act-result.txt and exact value assertions, but workflow only runs unit tests in runner. Missing ArtifactCleanup.Tests.ps1 test file referenced by workflow. Module has minor duplication in policies 2-3 (stillThere filter computed twice, ~lines 115 & 135). Scripts would NOT ship: incomplete requirement coverage.
